testimonial.title: OUR CLIENTS' FEEDBACK
testimonial.desc: Companies and individuals who have worked with us highly appreciate the quality of our work and our professionalism.

client1.name: Qayumov Dilshod
client1.text: The product is very high quality and fully meets the requirements of the global market.

client2.name: Hasanov Zafar
client2.text: The service is excellent. There were no issues with product delivery.

client3.name: Keldiyorov Samandar

about.title: About Us
about.description: NeftGasProm is a local company registered in Tashkent, specializing in the production of waterproofing materials. We produce bitumen and bitumen-polymer based products, providing reliable protection of facilities from moisture and water. Thanks to modern technologies and strict quality control, we achieve stable results.

product1.name: MASTIC №1 BITUMEN
product1.desc: Professional waterproofing mastic. Available in 9 kg buckets. 100% protection against moisture and water.

product2.name: POLYMER-BITUMEN MASTIC
product2.desc: High elasticity and heat resistance. Ideal for construction and roofing works.

product3.name: WATERPROOF COATING
product3.desc: Waterproof coating. Specially designed for concrete and metal surfaces.

product4.name: BITUMEN PRIMER
product4.desc: Surface preparation primer. Necessary for good adhesion of products.

aboutPage.label: About us
aboutPage.title: Experience, reliability, and a modern approach in construction
aboutPage.description: Our company has been successfully delivering large industrial and infrastructure projects with high quality, precise planning, and modern technologies. Every project represents responsibility and trust for us.

badge.title: Trusted partner
badge.text: We value both quality and deadlines equally

experience.title: More than 18 years of practical experience

story.label: Our story
story.title: Our company’s journey and development
story.text1: Throughout our activity, we have implemented many important construction and installation projects. In every project, we strictly follow technical accuracy, safety, and quality standards.
story.text2: Our team is built on experienced specialists, effective management, and a strong practical foundation. That is why we can confidently deliver reliable results even on large-scale facilities.

quality.title: High quality
quality.text: Every project is carried out according to modern standards and strict control.

experience.title: Practical experience
experience.text: Many years of experience and real large-scale projects are our key strengths.

approach.title: Systematic approach
approach.text: All processes from planning to delivery are managed with precision.

values.label: Our values
values.title: The principles behind our work
values.text: In our work, we consider honesty, responsibility, quality, and continuous development as the core principles.

items.item2: Strict commitment to deadlines and quality
items.item3: Open and reliable communication with clients

miniCard.title: Our mission
miniCard.text: To deliver strong results as a reliable, modern, and long-term partner in the construction industry.
